name: Neurocrine Biosciences
confidenceReason: Dominant franchise in tardive dyskinesia (Ingrezza). 15-20% EPS growth. Strong pipeline in neuropsychiatry. But single-product concentration risk.
bullCase: Ingrezza is the gold standard for tardive dyskinesia with $2.5B+ peak sales potential. Deep neuropsych pipeline (crinecerfont for CAH, muscarinic agonists for schizophrenia). Net cash balance sheet. 15-20% EPS growth through 2028+.
bearCase: Ingrezza is ~90% of revenue — extreme concentration risk. Generic competition could emerge. Pipeline clinical trial risk. Neuropsych drug development has high failure rates.

cagrModel.basis: GAAP EPS; specialty pharma peers trade 18-30x; base reflects pipeline optionality

screener.note: DEPLOY override: base CAGR 35% >= 20% and stabilized

description: Neurocrine Biosciences, Inc. discovers, develops, and commercialize pharmaceuticals for neurological, psychiatric, endocrine, and immunological disorders in the United States and internationally.
